mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.PROP_TYPE = UPPER(#{propType})
AND A.DEAL_TYPE = #{dealType}
AND (A.PROP_NM LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR A.ADDRESS LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.PROP_TYPE , CASE A.PROP_TYPE WHEN 'APT' THEN '아파트' WHEN 'OFFICETEL' THEN '오피스텔' WHEN 'VILLA' THEN '빌라/주택' WHEN 'ONEROOM' THEN '원룸/투룸' WHEN 'SHOP' THEN '상가' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '사무실' ELSE '' END AS PROP_TYPE_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.BADGE_TYPE = 'RECOMMEND' AND A.MAIN_YN = 'Y' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.MAIN_YN_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.PROP_TYPE , CASE A.PROP_TYPE WHEN 'APT' THEN '아파트' WHEN 'OFFICETEL' THEN '오피스텔' WHEN 'VILLA' THEN '빌라/주택' WHEN 'ONEROOM' THEN '원룸/투룸' WHEN 'SHOP' THEN '상가' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '사무실' ELSE '' END AS PROP_TYPE_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.VIEW_CNT DESC, A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.PROP_TYPE , CASE A.PROP_TYPE WHEN 'APT' THEN '아파트' WHEN 'OFFICETEL' THEN '오피스텔' WHEN 'VILLA' THEN '빌라/주택' WHEN 'ONEROOM' THEN '원룸/투룸' WHEN 'SHOP' THEN '상가' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '사무실' ELSE '' END AS PROP_TYPE_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.BADGE_TYPE = 'URGENT' AND A.MAIN_YN = 'Y' AND A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.MAIN_YN_DTM DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT A.PROP_CD, A.PROP_NM, A.PROP_TYPE , CASE A.PROP_TYPE WHEN 'APT' THEN '아파트' WHEN 'OFFICETEL' THEN '오피스텔' WHEN 'VILLA' THEN '빌라/주택' WHEN 'ONEROOM' THEN '원룸/투룸' WHEN 'SHOP' THEN '상가' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '사무실' ELSE '' END AS PROP_TYPE_NM , A.DEAL_TYPE , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , A.SELL_PRICE, A.DEPOSIT, A.MONTHLY_RENT , A.AREA_EXCLUSIVE, A.ROOM_CNT, A.FLOOR_NO , A.ADDRESS, A.BADGE_TYPE , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.SOLD_YN = 'N' AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.RGT_DTM DESC LIMIT 3

SELECT A.* , CASE A.PROP_TYPE WHEN 'APT' THEN '아파트' WHEN 'OFFICETEL' THEN '오피스텔' WHEN 'VILLA' THEN '빌라/주택' WHEN 'ONEROOM' THEN '원룸/투룸' WHEN 'SHOP' THEN '상가' WHEN 'OFFICE' THEN '사무실' ELSE '' END AS PROP_TYPE_NM , CASE A.DEAL_TYPE WHEN 'SELL' THEN '매매' WHEN 'JEONSE' THEN '전세' WHEN 'WOLSE' THEN '월세' WHEN 'RENT' THEN '임대' ELSE '' END AS DEAL_TYPE_NM , (SELECT CONCAT(F.SAVE_PATH, '/', F.SAVE_FILE_NM) FROM TB_UPLD_FILE F WHERE F.UPLD_FILE_CD COLLATE utf8mb4_unicode_ci = A.ATCH_FILE_KEY AND F.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY F.FILE_SEQ ASC LIMIT 1) AS THUMB_PATH , DATE_FORMAT(A.RGT_DTM, '%Y-%m-%d') AS RGT_DTM_FMT FROM TB_PROPERTY A WHERE A.PROP_CD = #{id} AND A.DEL_YN = 'N'
